facts.subject: Article 18 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999
facts.object: the difference between quotations or prices on the world market for the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of that Regulation and prices for those products within the Community may be covered by an export refund
facts.natural_language: The Commission may cover the difference between world market quotations and prices within the Community with an export refund.

source_locator.quote: Article 18 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that the difference between quotations or prices on the world market for the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of that Regulation and prices for those products within the Community may be covered by an export refund.

extra.model_quote: Article 18 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that the difference between quotations or prices on the world market for the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of that Regulation and prices for those products within the Community may be covered by an export refund.

facts.subject: the Commission
facts.object: the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999
facts.natural_language: The Commission must take into account the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999.

source_locator.quote: Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that when refunds on white and raw sugar, undenatured and exported in its unaltered state, are being fixed account must be taken of the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of that Regulation;

extra.model_quote: Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that when refunds on white and raw sugar, undenatured and exported in its unaltered state, are being fixed account must be taken of the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of that Regulation;

facts.predicate: provides that when refunds on white and raw sugar, undenatured and exported in its unaltered state, are being fixed account must be taken of
facts.object: the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of that Regulation
facts.natural_language: The Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 stipulates that refunds on white and raw sugar must consider market conditions and cost factors.

source_locator.quote: Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999 provides that when refunds on white and raw sugar, undenatured and exported in its unaltered state, are being fixed account must be taken of the situation on the Community and world markets in sugar and in particular of the price and cost factors set out in Article 19 of that Regulation

facts.subject: export refund on raw sugar
facts.predicate: must be fixed in respect of
facts.natural_language: The export refund on raw sugar must be fixed in respect of the standard quality.

source_locator.quote: The refund on raw sugar must be fixed in respect of the standard quality

extra.model_quote: The refund on raw sugar must be fixed in respect of the standard quality

facts.subject: standard quality for raw sugar
facts.object: Article 1 of Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968
facts.natural_language: The standard quality for raw sugar is defined in Article 1 of Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968.

source_locator.quote: Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968 determining the standard quality for raw sugar and fixing the Community frontier crossing point for calculating cif prices for sugar

extra.model_quote: Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968 determining the standard quality for raw sugar and fixing the Community frontier crossing point for calculating cif prices for sugar

facts.subject: Community frontier crossing point for calculating cif prices for sugar
facts.object: Article 1 of Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968
facts.natural_language: The Community frontier crossing point for calculating cif prices for sugar is defined in Article 1 of Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968.

source_locator.quote: Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968 determining the standard quality for raw sugar and fixing the Community frontier crossing point for calculating cif prices for sugar

extra.model_quote: Council Regulation (EC) No 431/68 of 9 April 1968 determining the standard quality for raw sugar and fixing the Community frontier crossing point for calculating cif prices for sugar

facts.subject: this refund
facts.predicate: should be fixed in accordance with
facts.natural_language: Furthermore, this refund should be fixed in accordance with Article 19(4) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999.

facts.subject: candy sugar
facts.object: Commission Regulation (EC) No 2135/95 of 7 September 1995 laying down detailed rules of application for the grant of export refunds in the sugar sector
facts.natural_language: Candy sugar is defined in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2135/95 of 7 September 1995 laying down detailed rules of application for the grant of export refunds in the sugar sector.

source_locator.quote: Commission Regulation (EC) No 2135/95 of 7 September 1995 laying down detailed rules of application for the grant of export refunds in the sugar sector

extra.model_quote: Commission Regulation (EC) No 2135/95 of 7 September 1995 laying down detailed rules of application for the grant of export refunds in the sugar sector

facts.subject: refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter
facts.natural_language: The refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter must apply to their sucrose content and, accordingly, be fixed per 1 % of the said content.

source_locator.quote: the refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter must apply to their sucrose content and, accordingly, be fixed per 1 % of the said content

extra.model_quote: the refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter must apply to their sucrose content and, accordingly, be fixed per 1 % of the said content

facts.subject: refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter
facts.natural_language: The refund thus calculated for sugar containing added flavouring or colouring matter must apply to their sucrose content and, accordingly, be fixed per 1 % of the said content.

facts.subject: the world market situation
facts.object: vary the refund for sugar according to destination
facts.natural_language: The world market situation or the specific requirements of certain markets may make it necessary to vary the refund for sugar according to destination.

source_locator.quote: The world market situation or the specific requirements of certain markets may make it necessary to vary the refund for sugar according to destination.

extra.model_quote: The world market situation or the specific requirements of certain markets may make it necessary to vary the refund for sugar according to destination.

facts.subject: the Commission
facts.natural_language: The Commission may fix the amount of the refund by other legal instruments in special cases.

source_locator.quote: In special cases, the amount of the refund may be fixed by other legal instruments.

extra.model_quote: In special cases, the amount of the refund may be fixed by other legal instruments.

facts.subject: the export refunds
facts.natural_language: The export refunds must be fixed every two weeks.

source_locator.quote: The refund must be fixed every two weeks;

extra.model_quote: The refund must be fixed every two weeks;

facts.subject: the refund
facts.natural_language: The refund may be altered in the intervening period.

source_locator.quote: whereas it may be altered in the intervening period.

extra.model_quote: whereas it may be altered in the intervening period.

facts.subject: the Commission
facts.natural_language: The Commission should set the refund as specified in the Annex.

source_locator.quote: It follows from applying the rules set out above to the present situation on the market in sugar and in particular to quotations or prices for sugar within the Community and on the world market that the refund should be as set out in the Annex hereto.

extra.model_quote: It follows from applying the rules set out above to the present situation on the market in sugar and in particular to quotations or prices for sugar within the Community and on the world market that the refund should be as set out in the Annex hereto.

facts.subject: the measures provided for in this Regulation
facts.object: the opinion of the Management Committee for Sugar
facts.natural_language: The measures provided for in this Regulation are in accordance with the opinion of the Management Committee for Sugar.

source_locator.quote: The measures provided for in this Regulation are in accordance with the opinion of the Management Committee for Sugar,

extra.model_quote: The measures provided for in this Regulation are in accordance with the opinion of the Management Committee for Sugar,

facts.subject: the export refunds
facts.object: to the amounts shown in the Annex hereto
facts.natural_language: The export refunds on the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999, undenatured and exported in the natural state, are hereby fixed to the amounts shown in the Annex hereto.

source_locator.quote:
Article 1
The export refunds on the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999, undenatured and exported in the natural state, are hereby fixed to the amounts shown in the Annex hereto.

extra.model_quote:
Article 1
The export refunds on the products listed in Article 1(1)(a) of Regulation (EC) No 2038/1999, undenatured and exported in the natural state, are hereby fixed to the amounts shown in the Annex hereto.
